title: 最優秀クラシックウマ娘選出！

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
<username>! I have amazing
news to share!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
You see, I'm on the panel of selectors for the Best
Umamusume Awards, and—

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I just heard some great news from the URA. You
might have received an email already, but I
thought I'd tell you in person anyway.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, but I see you have a visitor. I apologize for
barging in.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! I think we may be here about the same
thing!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I see. In that case, take a look at this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I open up the letter she hands me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Dear <chrname>, we are pleased to
inform you that you have been selected as this
year's Best Classic Year Umamusume."

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Yes. The award goes to the Umamusume deemed
to have had the best overall performance
throughout the year.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
This is not an award that just anyone can hope to
win. In other words...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You did superb. That about sums it up. As a
fellow member of this academy, I am proud.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: I wish to congratulate you as well!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: That said, the Twinkle Series is far from over.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Stay focused, and keep up this momentum going
into senior year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, <chrname> and I vow to keep
working hard next year, too.
